title: MVP: allow approve/reject directly from 'submitted' (collapse unreachable 'under_review')
business_reason: gen_guards.py surfaced that the workflow lets approve_school only from 'under_review', but no transition produces 'under_review' (it is unreachable). The MVP onboarding flow reviews and approves a submitted case directly. Add 'submitted' to approve_school.from so the generated lifecycle guard matches the MVP flow.
